# ApplyRedemptionCodeCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to complete the installation of an app using a redemption code.

## Declaration

```swift
object ApplyRedemptionCodeCommand
```

## Objects

- **ApplyRedemptionCodeCommand.Command**: The command to complete the installation of an app using a redemption code.

## Commands and responses

- **ApplyRedemptionCodeResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to complete the installation of an app using a redemption code.
